articles.title: XRP Community is Engaging in Conspiracy Theory: Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has reiterated that several XRP community members are embarking on a conspiracy theory campaign against Ethereum’s Co-Founder, Joseph Lubin. According to Hoskinson, many XRP supporters believe Lubin bribed the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to go after XRP to eliminate competition for Ethereum.
